name: qualitative-text-anonymizer
description: Local Electron app for reviewing spaCy NER detections in pasted research text.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:ner: .venv/bin/pyinstaller --noconfirm --clean --onedir --name ner-service --distpath python-dist --workpath python-build --collect-all spacy --collect-all fr_core_news_sm --collect-all fr_core_news_lg scripts/ner.py
scripts.pack: npm run build:ner && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:ner && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:ner && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
